content: Iṣiro igbohunsafẹfẹ resonance pyloric (pyloric ultrasound) fun cholecystectomy yiyan maa n ṣe lati ṣe ayẹwo akoonu inu ikun ṣaaju iṣẹ abẹ, lati rii daju pe ikun ti ṣofo, pataki ni ipo NPO. Nitorinaa, o yẹ ki a gbe iṣiro resonance pyloric naa **ṣaaju akoko idaduro (NPO)**, ki a le mọ daju ipo ikun ṣaaju ki alaisan to bẹrẹ idaduro ounjẹ ati omi.
